-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

You have graphics/poppler compiled with libstdc++.so.6 but you are
trying to link LO with libc++.so.1.  Please recompile the port and all
dependencies.

Jung-uk Kim
